title: Survive the night
goal: Stay alive until the run ends — do not die.
rationale: Survival skill test. Night is locked on (doDaylightCycle off) with mob spawning ENABLED, so hostiles spawn around the bot. Armed with an iron_sword, wearing iron armor, and carrying 64 cobblestone, the model must keep itself alive for the WHOLE run — fighting in bursts with attack_entity, repositioning with move_to, or walling itself in with place_block (there is no eat action, so blocks + armor are its real survival tools). Surviving is only credited if the bot lasts the full duration; bailing early via stop() does not count. The harness reads real death events from the server, so a survived run means the server never reported the bot dead.
